description_long: This is a military-style metal ammunition storage box, rectangular in shape with a rugged, olive drab green finish. The box features a hinged lid with a robust metal handle on top for easy carrying, and a secure latch mechanism on the front for closure. Stenciled white text on the front face indicates its original contents and lot information, giving it an authentic, utilitarian appearance. Both sides of the box display adhesive barcode and inventory labels, suggesting it has been repurposed or cataloged for storage or transport. The surface shows signs of wear, with minor dents and scratches, consistent with heavy-duty use. Its sturdy construction and compact size make it suitable for secure storage of tools, equipment, or other valuables in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or storage rooms.
description: A rugged, olive green metal ammunition storage box with a hinged lid, top handle, and stenciled military markings. It features secure latching and visible wear, with barcode labels on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing stenciled white military text and the main face of the box.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the latch mechanism and a small white adhesive label near the closure.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, unmarked surface and visible wear.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring two adhesive barcode labels and the box's rectangular profile.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: stenciled military markings and adhesive barcode labels
